message:
fix(tui): clear loading state when no phage in SelectionPressureOverlay

The TUI overlay started with loading=true but early-returned without
clearing it when currentPhage was null, causing a stuck spinner.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
